headline: Computer Vision
description: Computer Vision enables machines to extract meaning from visual data. Key tasks: image classification (what is this?), object detection (where is it? + bounding box), segmentation (pixel-level labeling), pose estimation, depth estimation, 3D reconstruction. Deep learning (CNN, ViT) dominates since 2012.

citation.name: Computer Vision: Algorithms and Applications (2nd Ed)
citation.author: Szeliski, Richard

citation.name: ImageNet Classification with Deep Convolutional Neural Networks (AlexNet)
citation.author: Krizhevsky, Sutskever, Hinton
